title: Technique Level 1
summary: Original foundational drills for fingers, position control, and scale fluency.

exercises.title: C Major RH Ascent
exercises.summary: One-octave C major scale up in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Play an even ascending scale with relaxed fingers.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Major RH Descent
exercises.summary: One-octave C major scale down in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Play an even descending scale with clear finger changes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Major LH Ascent
exercises.summary: One-octave C major scale up in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Keep the left hand even and relaxed in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Major LH Descent
exercises.summary: One-octave C major scale down in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Maintain balanced tone while descending in the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Five Finger RH Lift
exercises.summary: Right-hand five-finger pattern up and back.
exercises.goal: Stay curved and even through a five-finger shape.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Five Finger LH Lift
exercises.summary: Left-hand five-finger pattern up and back.
exercises.goal: Keep the left hand stable through a five-finger frame.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Broken Third RH
exercises.summary: Alternating thirds in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Move cleanly between repeated broken-third shapes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Broken Third LH
exercises.summary: Alternating thirds in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Move the left hand smoothly through third patterns.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Triad RH Broken
exercises.summary: Broken C major triad in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Play a stable broken triad shape.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: C Triad LH Broken
exercises.summary: Broken C major triad in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Maintain a steady left-hand arpeggio feel.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Repeated Second Finger RH
exercises.summary: Controlled repeated notes in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Repeat one key evenly without tension.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Repeated Second Finger LH
exercises.summary: Controlled repeated notes in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Repeat evenly in the left hand without collapsing the finger.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Contrary Touch RH
exercises.summary: Short outward and inward motions in one hand position.
exercises.goal: Feel small expansions and contractions evenly.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Contrary Touch LH
exercises.summary: Short outward and inward motions in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Control small left-hand expansions and returns.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Technique Checkpoint
exercises.summary: A compact review of scale, pattern, and triad motion.
exercises.goal: Switch between common technical shapes with steady rhythm.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major RH Up
exercises.summary: One-octave G major scale ascending in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Play an even G major scale, noting the F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major RH Down
exercises.summary: One-octave G major scale descending in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Descend the G major scale with even finger weight.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: RH Position Shift
exercises.summary: Practice moving from C position to G position without a gap.
exercises.goal: Shift hand positions cleanly at the bar line.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Staccato Touch RH
exercises.summary: Short detached touches on repeated note patterns.
exercises.goal: Play staccato quarter notes with a lifted wrist motion.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Technique Finale
exercises.summary: A complete technical review combining scales, patterns, and position shifts.
exercises.goal: Chain technical patterns cleanly from start to finish.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
